# Weekly Status Update Template

## Purpose
Provide stakeholders with a concise, consistent weekly summary of project progress, risks, and decisions needed.

---

## Weekly Status Update

**Project:** `[Project Name]`
**Reporting Period:** `YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD`
**Prepared by:** `[Name]`
**Status:** 🟢 On Track / 🟡 At Risk / 🔴 Off Track

---

### Overall Summary
> One to three sentences describing the current state of the project.

---

### Progress This Week

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| [Feature / Task / Milestone] | ✅ Complete / 🔄 In Progress / ⏸ Blocked | |
| | | |

---

### Key Metrics

| Metric | Target | Actual | Trend |
|--------|--------|--------|-------|
| Velocity (story points) | | | ↑ / → / ↓ |
| Open bugs (P1/P2) | | | |
| CI pass rate | | | |
| [Project-specific metric] | | | |

---

### Risks & Blockers

| ID | Description | Impact | Owner | Action / Ask |
|----|-------------|--------|-------|-------------|
| R-xxx | | H/M/L | | |

> Full risk details in the [Risk Register](risk-register-template.md).

---

### Decisions Needed

| # | Decision Required | Background | Owner | Due By |
|---|-------------------|-----------|-------|--------|
| 1 | | | | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

### Next Week's Plan

| Item | Owner | Target Date |
|------|-------|-------------|
| | | |
| | | |

---

### Upcoming Milestones

| Milestone | Target Date | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| | YYYY-MM-DD | 🟢 On Track |
| | YYYY-MM-DD | 🟡 At Risk |

---

### Notes / FYI
> Optional: anything the team or stakeholders should be aware of that doesn't fit above.

---

## Distribution
Send to: `[Stakeholder list or distribution group]`
Archive location: `[Link to project repo/docs folder]`
